body_html:
check again next week

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise.

Darren

Subject: Touching base
Date: Wed, 15 Feb 2006 16:55:25 -0500
From: "Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt"
talvarez@clintonfoundation.org
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Dear Mr. Indyke,

I hope this e-mail finds you well. It is
mid-February now, thus, as we
had agreed, I wanted to touch base with you again in
regards to setting
up a meeting with Mr. Epstein and the Rwandan
students he is sponsoring.
If you can get a sense of him when he may be
available, I will be happy
to coordinate this. As I mentioned earlier, both
students are very eager
to get to know him, and have very flexible
schedules.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Tascha
